summary: The bell changes holder from Kar's mouth to Karina's hand without visible transfer, and then remains visually lit after being put into Karina's pocket.
Kar is already walking in the current scene, so describing her as standing up again without any intervening sitting or stopping breaks action continuity.
The object orientation and page visibility conflict in the same visible description, making the inspection of the old book physically unclear.
The focused book interaction repeats the same incompatible orientation and readable-page state, so the player-visible handling of the prop remains inconsistent.
